hooks.command: unchecked=$(grep -r -e "- \[ \]" docs/superpowers/plans/*saas-phase*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " \t"); stale=$(grep -e "Task ___" CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " \t"); msgs=""; [ "$unchecked" -gt 0 ] && msgs="${unchecked} unchecked boxes in saas-phase plan(s). "; [ "$stale" -gt 0 ] && msgs="${msgs}CLAUDE.md session handoff has blank Task fields. "; [ -n "$msgs" ] && printf '{"systemMessage":"TRACKING GAP DETECTED: %sUpdate plan checkboxes and update.md before ending session."}' "$msgs" || true
